name: theos-farm-checkout-functions
description: Host-neutral trusted checkout scaffold for Theo's Farm Stripe Checkout handoff.

scripts.check: node --check src/index.js && node --check src/order-validation.js && node --check src/index.test.js && node --check src/order-validation.test.js && node --test src/index.test.js src/order-validation.test.js
